2606.12109.title: Bridging the Morphology Gap: Adapting VLA Models to Dexterous Manipulation via Intent-Conditioned Fine-Tuning
2606.12109.paper_summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have demonstrated remarkable zero-shot generalization in robotic manipulation, yet the vast majority of pre-trained pipelines remain strictly confined to low-DoF parallel grippers. Adapting these rich semantic priors to high-DoF dexterous hands introduces a severe morphology gap, direct end-to-end joint fine-tuning inherently causes catastrophic forgetting of spatial reasoning and acute action manifold collapse due to data scarcity. In this paper, we present InDex, a novel, data-efficient adaptation framework rooted in cross-morphology semantic inheritance. Rather than discarding the pre-trained 1-DoF parallel grasp output, we repurpose it as a continuous, macroscopic virtual grasp intent proxy to sequentialize the control topology. We implement a two-stage decoupled learning architecture: the first stage parameter-efficiently aligns the VLA backbone to predict continuous arm trajectories and the scalar grasp intent; the second stage freezes this spatial backbone and leverages an intent-conditioned denoising diffusion head to decode fine-grained joint articulations for multi-fingered end-effectors. Extensive simulation benchmarks across a suite of multi-stage, contact-rich dexterous manipulation tasks demonstrate that InDex effectively masters intricate skills with minimal demonstration data, substantially outperforming monolithic baselines while preserving the robust spatial generalizability of the original VLA prior.
2606.12109.paper_summary_zh: 視覺-語言-行動 (VLA) 模型在機器人操作中展示了顯著的零樣本泛化能力，然而絕大多數的預訓練管道仍然嚴格限制於低自由度的平行夾爪。將這些豐富的語義先驗適應於高自由度的靈巧手會引入嚴重的形態差距，直接的端到端關節微調本質上會因數據稀缺而導致空間推理的災難性遺忘和急劇的行動流形崩潰。在本文中，我們提出了 InDex，一個新穎的、數據高效的適應框架，根植於跨形態的語義繼承。我們並未丟棄預訓練的 1 自由度平行抓取輸出，而是將其重新用作連續的、宏觀的虛擬抓取意圖代理，以序列化控制拓撲。我們實現了一個兩階段的解耦學習架構：第一階段高效地對齊 VLA 主幹，以預測連續的臂部軌跡和標量抓取意圖；第二階段凍結這個空間主幹，並利用意圖條件的去噪擴散頭來解碼多指末端執行器的細粒度關節運動。對一系列多階段、接觸豐富的靈巧操作任務進行的廣泛模擬基準測試表明，InDex 能夠有效掌握複雜技能，僅需最少的示範數據，顯著超越單一基準，同時保持原始 VLA 先驗的強大空間泛化能力。
2606.12109.author: Chuanke Pang et.al.
2606.12109.authors: Chuanke Pang, Junyi Huang, Zhijun Zhao, Yaobing Wang, Kun Xu, Xilun Ding
